mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, attendance_status, original_attendance_status, makeup_application_id, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, attendance_status, original_attendance_status, makeup_application_id, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, attendance_status, original_attendance_status, makeup_application_id, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}

SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, attendance_status, original_attendance_status, makeup_application_id, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND attendance_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY attendance_date DESC
SELECT id, employee_id, quota_month, total_count, used_count, assigned_by, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_makeup_quota WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND quota_month = #{quotaMonth}

SELECT id, employee_id, quota_month, total_count, used_count, assigned_by, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_makeup_quota WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND quota_month = #{quotaMonth} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET original_attendance_status = attendance_status, attendance_status = 'MAKEUP', makeup_application_id = #{applicationId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND attendance_status = 'LATE'
